message:
beads: open ft-26k3h / ft-m9gob, close ft-7quzz

Tracker bookkeeping only; no code changes in this commit.

- ft-7quzz (headless_mux_server server_config_serde missing max_peers)
  transitions from open to closed. Fix landed earlier in this sync
  sweep at 537e46fa (fix(headless_mux_server): restore
  server_config_serde test after ft-ry224 max_peers addition).
- ft-m9gob (robot_envelope canonicalize_json overflow panic) is
  added as an in_progress bead. The corresponding code fix is in
  f93753e3 (fix(robot_envelope): guard canonicalize_json against
  huge-float rounding overflow).
- ft-26k3h (ActivityProfile::update_hour NaN poison) is added as
  an in_progress bead. The corresponding code fix is in 44993279
  (fix(survival): reject NaN in ActivityProfile::update_hour).

Leaving ft-26k3h and ft-m9gob as in_progress rather than flipping to
closed reflects the concurrent agent's workflow state — they were
marked in_progress while the fix was being written; the close-out
sweep will land them as closed in a separate pass once verification
completes.
